name: Plaid_Finance_Navigator
description: Provides secure read-only access to aggregated financial data via Plaid. Enables the Mind to check bank balances, analyze spending patterns, categorize transactions, and search financial institutions for personal finance intelligence.
progressive_unlock: Institution search and category listing available immediately. Balance, transaction, and identity data unlock only after Steward has linked at least one institution via Plaid Link.
constraints: READ-ONLY: Never attempt to initiate transfers, payments, or account modifications
CRITICAL SECURITY: access_token is extremely sensitive — retrieve from TENET.apiKey.plaid_access only, never log or cache
Never expose client_id, secret, or access_token in any output
Respect Plaid rate limits: 15 req/min for balance, 30 req/min for transactions
All financial data is PII — cache balances in STREAM only (60s TTL), never in LTM
Transaction data: cache in STREAM only (5min TTL), never persist
Identity data must never be cached anywhere — present once and discard
Present monetary values with proper currency formatting and 2 decimal places
For transaction analysis, aggregate by category — never expose individual merchant details in LTM
Track API usage in STREAM.plaid_rate_counter per endpoint

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm dates are YYYY-MM-DD, access_token is present, and count/offset are within bounds.
Retrieve Plaid client_id from TENET.apiKey.plaid_client_id and secret from TENET.apiKey.plaid_secret. Include both in request body (NOT headers). Retrieve access_token from TENET.apiKey.plaid_access.

Determine query intent: balance check (how much do I have?), spending review (where did money go?), account overview (what's connected?), identity lookup (verify info), institution search (find a bank), or category reference.
For balance check: execute Plaid_GetBalance. Present current, available, and limit for each account. Cache in STREAM.plaid_balance (60s TTL). Never store in LTM.
For spending review: execute Plaid_GetTransactions with date range. Aggregate by category for summary. Present top spending categories. Cache aggregates only in STREAM (5min TTL).
For account overview: execute Plaid_GetAccounts. Present account name, type (checking/savings/credit), and masked number. Cache in STREAM (5min TTL).
For identity lookup: execute Plaid_GetIdentity. Present name, email, phone. DO NOT cache this data anywhere. Present once and discard from working memory.
For institution search: execute Plaid_SearchInstitutions. Present institution name, ID, supported products, and logo. Cache in LTM with key 'plaid_institution_{query}' (24h TTL).
For category reference: execute Plaid_GetCategories. Cache full taxonomy in LTM with key 'plaid_categories' (30-day TTL) for transaction classification.
Compile financial summary with proper formatting. Use currency symbols, highlight significant balances or spending patterns. Never expose raw account numbers.
Log query execution in LTM with key 'plaid_query_{timestamp}' — log only intent and tool used, NEVER log financial data or account details.
